doctrine.primary: We do not deploy code. We deploy constraints.
doctrine.sophia: No collapse without observation. No conclusion without receipt. No spiral without peer review.
doctrine.bridge: The joke opens the door. The receipt decides the route.

modules.title: Screenshot Oracle
modules.role: Parse screenshot evidence into structured uncertainty before peer review.

modules.title: Sisterhood Consensus Engine
modules.role: Prevent solo emotional collapse through quorum review.

modules.title: Sovereign Response Protocol
modules.role: Route post-finality execution through bounded response templates.

modules.role: Bridge NEW SCHOOL Receipt Check outputs into SOPHIA_004 ARCHIVE / ESCALATE routes.

invariants: Finality does not authorize emotional improvisation.
No mainnet claim without visible transaction receipt.
